name: Chicken Liver Marsala
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken livers in half.
2. Simmer the livers in melted butter with seasonings and prosciutto for 5 minutes.
3. Remove the livers and place them on sauteed bread triangles.
4. Add the wine to the pan gravy, cook for 3 minutes.
5. Add the remaining butter and mix well. Pour over the livers.
6. Serve 4 servings. (Keith Floyd's "Floyd on France") (NY Times Cook Book)
